# _The Little Prince_
The Little Prince was a very small boy. He was no bigger than a little seed. He had a very small face and very small hands and very small feet. He was very small all over. He was so small that he could not even be seen without a special little telescope.
One day, he was sitting on the edge of a flower. He was looking at the stars. He was thinking of the stars. He was thinking of the stars because he was very sad. He was very sad because he was so small.
